note: Native task IDs 10-29 map to plan Tasks 1-20 (native id = plan task + 9). Full task bodies live in the native task store (TaskGet) and the plan .md sections. Tasks 7 (id 16) and 20 (id 29) are manual user gates.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Project scaffold + build skeleton
tasks.description:
Meson project; libchoir_ipc + choir + libchoir_overlay.so stubs; XDG paths (TDD).
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson setup build -Dbuild_tests=true && meson compile -C build && meson test -C build"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: libchoir_ipc wire contract
tasks.description:
Shared state/protocol/framing/avatar-file types + round-trip tests (the locked contract).
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build state protocol framing avatar_file"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Discord IPC transport
tasks.description:
Connect discord-ipc-0..9; op/len framing; mock-server test.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build ipc_transport"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RPC message builders + event parsers
tasks.description:
AUTHORIZE/AUTHENTICATE/SUBSCRIBE builders + parse_event -> RpcEvent.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build rpc_messages"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: OAuth token exchange
tasks.description:
code->token (Streamkit default + own-app) behind injectable HttpPost.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build oauth"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: RPC client state machine
tasks.description:
Full FSM handshake->authorize->token->authenticate->subscribe; scripted mock test.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build rpc_client"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: MANUAL GATE M0 auth spike
tasks.description:
USER-RUN: prove Streamkit RPC flow vs real Discord; flip to own-app if needed.
```json:metadata
{"userGate":true,"tags":["user-gate","manual","milestone-m0"],"verifyCommand":"./build/tests/harness/auth_spike"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Test harness (headless Vulkan + fake host)
tasks.description:
vk_min_present (EXT_headless_surface, PPM readback, exit 77 skip) + fake_host scripted snapshot/avatars.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"./build/tests/harness/vk_min_present --frames 3 --readback /tmp/f.ppm; echo exit=$?"}
```

tasks.description:
Manifest + negotiate v2 + instance/device dispatch + gating; pass-through load into vk_min_present.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"VK_LAYER_PATH=build/src/layer VK_INSTANCE_LAYERS=VK_LAYER_choir_overlay_x86_64 ./build/tests/harness/vk_min_present --frames 2; echo exit=$?"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: Robustness & failure isolation
tasks.description:
Catch all overlay failures; fault-injection tests; never crash the game; 300-frame clean run.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"meson test -C build layer_faults"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: Install / packaging (per-user)
tasks.description:
meson install + install-user.sh (manifest to ~/.local/share/vulkan/implicit_layer.d) + autostart + README.
```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand":"bash packaging/install-user.sh && test -f ~/.local/share/vulkan/implicit_layer.d/choir_overlay.x86_64.json && ~/.local/bin/choir --version"}
```
